task: Restore lost Antigravity fixes for Codex API compatibility and the API Proxy VS Code helper UI.

edits.summary: Strip top-level tools from Codex-routed bodies instead of rejecting the request and update the adapter test.
Restore computed proxy endpoint helpers and add the VS Code / Copilot custom OAI setup card with copy buttons and generated chatLanguageModels.json.

verification.notes: Build emitted existing Vite chunk-size and dynamic-import warnings but no new errors.

outcome: The lost backend and GUI fixes are restored. Codex-backed requests no longer fail just because a client sends tools, and the API Proxy page again exposes the VS Code setup guidance and copyable config.
